planningPeriods.objective: Establish HEYDUDE as a top-10 TikTok Shop footwear brand by driving creator-led discovery and growing the affiliate network.
planningPeriods.goal: Achieve $5M GMV in Q1 by activating 80+ creators and launching 3 hero product campaigns during peak Valentine's and St. Patrick's Day moments.

planningPeriods.objective: Scale the affiliate creator program by deepening relationships with top performers and expanding LIVE commerce capabilities.
planningPeriods.goal: Hit $5.5M GMV in Q2 by growing LIVE GMV to 25% of total sales and launching a HEYDUDE Summer campaign with 100+ creator partners.

planningPeriods.objective: Capitalize on Back-to-School and new Fall arrivals to drive peak seasonal performance and establish category dominance.
planningPeriods.goal: Exceed $8M GMV in Q3 through a major Back-to-School push, new arrival seeding, and 3 brand LIVE events generating $300K+ each.

planningPeriods.objective: Maximize Holiday season revenue through concentrated gifting campaigns, increased ad investment, and high-frequency LIVE commerce events.
planningPeriods.goal: Drive $10M GMV in Q4 by dominating the Holiday gift guide cycle, doubling ad spend during Black Friday/Cyber Monday, and scheduling weekly brand LIVE events through December.

tasks.task: Seed new Fall/Winter SKUs to top 30 affiliate creators
tasks.notes: All 30 creators confirmed receipt. First videos going live week of Aug 18.

tasks.task: Run 'New Arrivals' creator contest — top GMV wins $1K prize
tasks.notes: Contest ran Aug 18–31. Winner: @comfyvibes with $42K GMV. 28 participants total.

tasks.task: Outreach to 20 new micro-creators in footwear/lifestyle niche
tasks.notes: 12 of 20 have responded. 8 onboarded, 4 still in negotiation.

tasks.task: Produce 2 brand-side unboxing videos featuring new SKUs
tasks.notes: First video filmed. Editing in progress. Second shoot scheduled for Sept 16.

tasks.task: Brief creator partners on new Fall messaging pillars
tasks.notes: Messaging deck sent to all active affiliates via email + Slack.

tasks.task: Recruit 10 new LIVE-capable creators to the affiliate program
tasks.notes: 6 identified, 3 onboarded. Target is footwear/lifestyle creators with 50K+ followers.

tasks.task: Schedule 2 brand handle LIVE streams per month through Q4
tasks.notes: Waiting on content calendar approval. Host talent not yet confirmed.

tasks.task: Set up LIVE performance leaderboard and share weekly with creators
tasks.notes: Blocked on TikTok API access. Ticket submitted to platform team 2 weeks ago — no response yet.

tasks.task: Negotiate L3+ creator exclusive LIVE incentive package
tasks.notes: Proposed package: $500 bonus for LIVE sessions exceeding $20K GMV.

tasks.task: Submit HEYDUDE products to TikTok Shop Holiday Gift Guide curation
tasks.notes: Submitted 6 SKUs. TikTok confirmed 3 were accepted into the Gift Guide.

tasks.task: Plan Black Friday ad spend ramp — 3x daily budget Nov 25–Dec 2
tasks.notes: Draft budget approved. Waiting on final sign-off from client. Campaign structure built in ads manager.

tasks.task: Seed Holiday bundle SKUs to top 50 creators by Nov 1
tasks.notes: Bundle SKUs not yet confirmed by client. Need product list by Oct 15.

tasks.task: Create 'Gift for Everyone' creator content brief and distribute
tasks.notes: Brief template drafted. Pending creative review.

tasks.task: Coordinate Cyber Monday flash sale with brand handle LIVE stream
tasks.notes: Proposed 3-hour LIVE with countdown timer and promo codes. Host and format TBD.
